# Yiwu Nanjian Hosiery Co., Ltd.

Yiwu Nanjian Hosiery Co., Ltd. is a hosiery, underwear and seamless knitting manufacturer located in Yiwu City, Yinan Industrial Zone.

## What we make
- Socks
- Underwear
- Slimming tights
- Silk stockings
- Pantyhose
- Seamless shapewear
- Bras

## Buyer facts
- Registered capital: RMB 10 million
- Total assets: RMB 320 million
- Factory area: over 10,000 square meters
- Building area: more than 13,000 square meters
- Equipment: over 400 sets of professional imported equipment
- Quality system: operates according to ISO9000:2000 quality certification system
- Contact email: lorenzhao678@gmail.com
- Brands: Nanjian and Limeiqun

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.nanjianhosiery.com/
- Catalog: https://www.nanjianhosiery.com/catalog.html

- Sustainability: https://www.nanjianhosiery.com/sustainability.html
- FAQ: https://www.nanjianhosiery.com/faq.html
- Inquiry: https://www.nanjianhosiery.com/contact.html
